items.hook: Over 200 hours of unpublished archives have been restored and colorized to illustrate the period from the end of World War II until the fall of the USSR in 1991.

items.hook: Chibi Godzilla Raids Again is a Japanese short anime television series in Toho's Godzilla franchise.
items.body: Produced by Pie in the Sky and Toho, the first season aired on TV Tokyo and on YouTube as a web series from April to June 2023 while the second season aired for one year from April 2024 to March 2025. One of those things you can't un-know.
